baseline_lyapunov.note: Approximate largest Lyapunov estimate from paired deterministic trajectories.

memory_lyapunov.note: Current ABI does not expose step-level/full-trajectory Lorenz63 state needed for faithful memory-side Lyapunov estimation.

note: Memory run available because the built-in C++ Lorenz63 scenario uses the same default initial state [1,1,1].

spectral_diagnosis.note: Current ABI does not expose the single-level Lorenz63 kernel directly; these values mirror the built-in scenario defaults.
